calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and defendant appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of the parties, not on the record.
